titleStmt.title: SII 27.206: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 206. (A.R. No. 485 of 1928-29.) BRAHMAVARA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the lumber room prākāra of the Mahāliṅgēśvara temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1177, Ānanda, Āśvayuja śu. 15, Kanyā 30, Monday, Saṁkramaṇa, Jupiter in Mithuna, corresponding regularly to 1254 A.D., September 28. The Śaka year, however, was current.

The record states that when the king was holding assembly in his capital at Bārahakanyāpura, it was stipulated in the presence of his nephew (aḷiya) Baṅkidēva, brother-in-law (mayduna) Voḍḍamadēva, Ballaveggaḍe and other ministers and preceptors (purōhita) that the mahājanas of Brahmavura should pay 700 gadyāṇas to the king once in three years as tidduva-samudāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēnamaḥ . svastiśrīmatu pāṁḍya cakrava
rttiarirāya gajakēsari bīrapāṁḍya dēvāḷpē
ṁdra dēvarasaru vijayarājya muttarōttara pra
varddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salu
ttamirdda śakavaruṣada 1177 neya mithunadalu bri
haspati yiddare Ānaṁda saṁvatsarada Āśvayu
ja su 15 sō kaṁnyāmāsa 30 neya saṁkra
maṇa sōmavāradaṁdu śrīmatu rājadhāni bā
rahakaṁnyapuradara maneyalu vaḍḍōlaga
ṁgoṭṭire śrīpāda saṁnidhānadalu Aḷi
ya baṁkidēva mayduna voḍḍamadēva ba
llaveggaḍe yiṁtivaru mukhyavāda sa
masta pradhānaruṁ purōhitaruṁ I
re brahmaurada nūṟu pārvvarige koṭṭaśāsana kra
maveṁteṁdaḍe Arasiṁga variṣa 3
kke tidduva samudāya ga 700 yi mari
yādeya tappisidaḍe Arasiṁge U
pradhānarigeU tappidava vāraṇāsiya taḍiyalu
sāvirakavileya koṁda dōṣa .
Digital edition of SII 27.206 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
